About

Full-stack developer and technical lead shipping AI tools and web platforms.

Based in Sweden · 10+ years of client work across Webflow, HubSpot CMS, and custom integrations.

I'm Felix, a full-stack developer and technical lead based in Sweden. I lead delivery across 10+ simultaneous client projects — scoping, architecture, development, deployment, integrations, and ongoing support.

I'm bilingual and conduct client work in Swedish and English.

What I build at work

Production Webflow sites, HubSpot CMS builds, and custom integrations for clients like Porsche Club Sweden, Precis Digital, and Neonode. Recent highlights: a decoupled Mapbox architecture for Salty.co, a Contentful-to-HubSpot migration pipeline (37 pages, 135 press releases), and a sub-month site launch for Resident Interface.

What I build on my own time

My current focus is context-vault, a local-first MCP server that gives AI agents persistent memory across sessions. Published on npm, 693+ tests, with a full SaaS ecosystem. I'm also building trained-on.com, an AI product photo generation platform for e-commerce.

Background

Before Stormfors I ran my own digital agency, which gave me a foundation across design, development, and managing client projects end-to-end. I moved into a focused engineering role to go deeper on the technical side, but I kept the product mindset.

I picked up HubSpot CMS entirely on the job in December 2025 and shipped two production projects within weeks. That's what I'm good at: learning fast and delivering while I learn.

Work with me

If you need a technical partner who can own both strategy and implementation, I'm best suited for:

  • AI-powered internal tools and MCP-based workflows.
  • Complex Webflow or HubSpot CMS builds with custom integrations.
  • Refactoring or rebuilding existing sites that are hard to maintain.

I take on a limited number of projects alongside my role at Stormfors.

Start a conversation

Recommendations

Mitch Davey

Colleague at Stormfors

Felix is a true Webflow wizard whose endless curiosity and dedication to his craft are truly inspiring. Much of what I know about Webflow, I learned by following his example. Felix was one of the OG members of Stormfors when I joined, and I saw first-hand how his expertise and innovative approach significantly shaped the direction of the company. His ability to tackle complex projects and deliver outstanding results consistently makes him an invaluable asset to any team.

Colin Simpson

Founder & CEO

Felix is a brilliant digital designer and developer. He understands his domain extremely well and constantly offers up his valuable perspective and solutions. I've thoroughly enjoyed working with him, especially because of his great communication style and attention to detail. You can tell he really loves what he does and it shows. I'd highly recommend Felix!

Johanna Appelgren

Head of Marketing

I had the pleasure of working with Felix on improving our company website and I couldn't be more impressed with his skills as a web developer. Felix is not only highly knowledgeable, but also a true professional who takes pride in his work. He was always available to address any concerns and provided creative solutions that helped take our website to the next level.

Technical focus
